summary: Crisp soundboard capture of a sunny SoCal summer show highlighted by an unforgettable Scarlet > Fire second‑set climax.
review: The recording is praised for its crystal‑clear soundboard quality, making every nuance audible. Fans rave about the high‑energy second set – especially the Twilight Zone intro that launches into a top‑tier Scarlet > Fire sequence along with standout moments from She Belongs to Me, Space, US Blues and Satisfaction. Overall the show is remembered as one of the most enjoyable 1985 performances.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings (mostly 4‑5) and enthusiastic comments about both performance and audio quality; recording is described as crisp soundboard, and the show receives multiple standout song mentions.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, clear soundboard mix with no reported dropouts or muffiness; listeners note the master sounds great even years later.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The second set is highlighted as a high‑energy, never‑dying performance – the Twilight Zone intro segues into Scarlet > Fire and keeps the momentum rolling through several fan‑favorite jams.
